sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Why D-Wave Quantum Stock Plummeted 23.2% Last Month and Has Inched Lower in April
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS) stock experienced a significant 23.2% decline in March, largely attributed to risk-off sentiment stemming from the Iran war, which raised concerns about inflation and interest rate policy negatively impacting speculative growth stocks. Despite a broader market rebound in April, D-Wave's stock has continued to inch lower, partly due to a lowered one-year price target from Mizuho, even though the firm maintained an outperform rating. The company's stock is now down approximately 45% year-to-date.

feed.title: QVC Group (OTCPK:QVCG.B) - Earnings & Revenue Performance
feed.summary: QVC Group (OTCPK:QVCG.B) is facing significant financial challenges, with declining earnings and revenues. The company's earnings have decreased by an average of 53.3% annually, while revenues have dropped by 9.5% per year, contrasting sharply with the Multiline Retail industry's growth. QVC Group is currently unprofitable, with increasing losses over the past five years, and its liabilities exceed its assets, complicating Return on Equity calculations.

feed.title: Form 144: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney (NASDAQ: RAPP) lists 360-share sale
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC has filed a Form 144 indicating a proposed sale of 360 shares of Rapport Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RAPP) common stock. The filing also disclosed 10b5-1 sales of 10,115 shares on March 25, 2026, for gross proceeds of $303,354.24. As of April 8, 2026, Rapport Therapeutics has 47,792,943 shares outstanding.

feed.title: PTC Therapeutics exec VP Boulding sells $157k in shares
feed.summary: Mark Elliott Boulding, Executive Vice President and CLO of PTC Therapeutics, sold 2,265 shares of common stock for $157,293 on April 6, 2026, while also exercising options to acquire an equal number of shares. This insider activity occurs as InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued, despite recent positive analyst ratings and Q4 2025 earnings reports. The company has also seen other developments, including the withdrawal of a New Drug Application for Translarna and a new board appointment.

feed.title: Phreesia (NYSE: PHR) accounting chief takes 13,636 RSUs instead of cash bonus
feed.summary: Phreesia's Principal Accounting Officer, Yvonne Hui, received 13,636 fully vested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 6, 2026, as compensation in lieu of her cash bonus for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2026. The RSUs were granted based on a per-share value of $9.15 and represented 115% of her earned cash bonus. Following this grant, Hui directly holds 42,802 common shares in the company.

feed.title: Phreesia (PHR) director Jon Kessler receives two RSU grants totaling 24,594 units
feed.summary: Phreesia, Inc. director Jon Kessler received two grants of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) totaling 24,594 units as part of his compensation. One grant of 4,376 RSUs vests fully by April 6, 2027, or the next annual stockholder meeting, while the second grant of 20,218 RSUs vests in four equal annual installments starting April 6, 2027. These awards are compensation-related and align his interests with the company's future share performance.

feed.title: Pioneer Power (PPSI) grows 2025 revenue 21% but swings to $6M net loss
feed.summary: Pioneer Power Solutions (PPSI) reported a 20.8% increase in 2025 revenue to $27.6 million, exceeding guidance, primarily due to higher sales of its e-Boost mobile EV charging solutions. Despite revenue growth, the company swung to a net loss of $6.0 million from a $31.9 million net income in 2024, attributed to a significant drop in gross margin to 12.4% and increased investments in new power systems like PRYMUS and PowerCore. The company also saw a decline in backlog and cash on hand, partly due to a special $16.7 million dividend payment.

feed.title: Principal Spectrum Preferred Securities Active ETF (NYSE:PREF)
feed.summary: This article provides details on the Principal Spectrum Preferred Securities Active ETF (NYSE: PREF), including its current share price of $19.00, recent performance, and key financial information. It highlights the ETF's share price movement, 52-week high and low, daily average trading volume, and its last dividend payment of $0.08 per share on April 6, 2026. The information is presented by InvestSMART, an investment research platform.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Expected to Announce Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) is slated to release its Q1 2026 earnings before the market opens on Thursday, April 16th, with analysts forecasting an EPS of $1.13 and revenue of $7.2693 billion. The company reported a beat in the previous quarter with EPS of $1.26 against an estimated $1.19. U.S. Bancorp also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share.

feed.title: Snap-On (SNA) Projected to Post Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Snap-On (SNA) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 16th, with analysts forecasting earnings of $4.77 per share and $1.1876 billion in revenue. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $2.44 per share, representing a 2.6% yield, and institutional investors own a significant portion of its stock. Recent insider selling has been noted, while several analysts have issued price targets and ratings on SNA shares.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) Projected to Post Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 16th, with analysts expecting $1.09 EPS and $2.1565 billion in revenue. The company previously beat EPS estimates, and analysts project $4 EPS for the current fiscal year and $5 for the next, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a price target of $69.14. CFG also pays a quarterly dividend of $0.46, yielding approximately 2.9%.

feed.title: Eversource Offers Free Trees to Dover Residents
feed.summary: Eversource has partnered with the Arbor Day Foundation to offer 1,000 free trees to residents of Dover and Merrimack, New Hampshire, and select areas of Connecticut. This marks the third consecutive year for the program, which aims to provide energy-saving benefits through shade and wind protection, aligning with Arbor Day on April 24, 2026. The initiative highlights Eversource's commitment to sustainability, helping residents reduce energy costs and improve the local environment.

feed.title: Cowen Maintains Buy on SW Smurfit Westrock Plc March 2026
feed.summary: Cowen & Co. maintained a Buy rating on Smurfit Westrock Plc (SW) on March 18, 2026, which is the only documented analyst action in Meyka's dataset, signaling continued analyst confidence despite limited coverage. The article notes a 7.98% price move for SW since the rating but highlights the absence of an explicit price target from Cowen. Meyka AI assigns SW a "B" grade, suggesting relative strength against benchmarks while advising investors to combine this rating with other financial analysis.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza Dominates BT Brands in Head-to-Head Comparison
feed.summary: A head-to-head analysis positions Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ:DPZ) as a stronger business compared to BT Brands (NASDAQ:BTBD). Domino's showcases superior financial metrics, higher institutional ownership, and more analyst support, highlighting its leadership in the pizza delivery industry. This analysis suggests Domino's as a more favorable investment due to its strong brand, technology, and financial performance.

feed.title: Vistra Prices $4 Billion Private Offering of Senior Notes
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. has announced the pricing of a $4 billion private offering of senior notes with maturities between 2028 and 2036. The proceeds will be used to repay existing debt and for general corporate purposes, strengthening the company's financial foundation. This offering provides Vistra with financial flexibility to invest in its power generation and retail electricity businesses and supports its efforts to provide reliable and sustainable power.

feed.title: Prologis (PLD) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 16th, with analysts expecting $0.806 EPS and $2.12 billion in revenue. The company previously reported $1.44 EPS and $2.25 billion revenue for the prior quarter and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.07. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock, and analysts currently rate PLD with a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Jury Deliberating in Cook County Case Over Abbott Laboratories' Formula for Premature Babies
feed.summary: A jury in Cook County Circuit Court is deliberating in a case against Abbott Laboratories regarding its specialized formula for premature infants. Four mothers allege their babies developed necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC) after consuming Abbott's Similac Special Care formula. This trial could significantly impact Abbott, which faces over 1,700 nationwide lawsuits concerning the formula's potential link to NEC.

feed.title: [144] Pharvaris N.V. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a SEC Form 144 filing by Pharvaris N.V. (PHVS) on April 8, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 23,333 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $649,590.72 by an unnamed person from whom the securities were acquired as Restricted Stock Units on May 31, 2025. The securities are to be sold through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC on NASDAQ.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against PACS Group, Inc. (PACS) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into PACS Group, Inc. (NYSE:PACS) regarding potential corporate wrongdoing involving its officers and/or directors. The firm is encouraging investors who purchased PACS securities before April 11, 2024, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC operates on a contingency fee basis, representing investors injured by securities fraud and aiming to restore investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: Paymentus Grants CEO Time-Based Restricted Stock Units
feed.summary: Paymentus Holdings granted its CEO, Dushyant Sharma, 480,000 time-based restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 7, 2026. These RSUs will vest over five years, aligning his long-term incentives with shareholder interests. An analyst rates Paymentus (PAY) as a Buy with a $27.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, also rates it as Outperform due to strong financial performance.

feed.title: PAVmed (NASDAQ: PAVM) Scott Dols reports 5.4% stake, 346,155 shares
feed.summary: Scott V. Dols has reported a beneficial ownership of 346,155 shares, representing a 5.4% stake in PAVmed Inc. (NASDAQ: PAVM). This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, based on 6,383,089 shares outstanding as of March 27, 2026. Dols holds sole voting and dispositive power over these shares, which include 230,770 shares held in a trust where he serves as trustee.

feed.title: Outset Medical (OM) EVP Elliott Derick A. files initial Form 3 insider report
feed.summary: Outset Medical, Inc.'s EVP, Commercial, Elliott Derick A., has filed an initial Form 3 insider ownership report. This filing establishes him as a reporting officer but does not indicate any buy, sell, or derivative transactions. The Form 3 confirms his insider status with 0 reported transactions and 0 net buy/sell shares.

feed.title: 5 Best Young Stocks to Buy Right Now
feed.summary: This article identifies five "young stocks" recommended for purchase, detailing one of them: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO). Veralto recently acquired GlobalVision to bolster its digital workflow solutions, a move expected to be neutral to its adjusted EPS in 2026 and accretive in 2027. The company also completed $300 million in share repurchases in Q1 2026.

feed.title: Trucking companies allegedly colluded with Kroger via no-hire agreements, complaint alleges
feed.summary: A lawsuit has been filed by former Quickway Transportation drivers, alleging that Kroger, along with carriers Werner, Swift (Knight-Swift), and U.S. Xpress, engaged in no-hire agreements. This alleged collusion prevented former Quickway drivers from securing employment after Kroger shifted routes, purportedly to suppress wages and hinder union activities. The suit seeks class-action status for over 100 drivers, damages, and judicial intervention into the alleged anti-competitive practices.

feed.title: Stress Testing AXON: Historical Drawdowns and Macro Risks
feed.summary: This article analyzes Axon Enterprise's (AXON) stock performance during 15 historical market crises, revealing an average drawdown of -24% compared to the S&P 500's -16%. It details how AXON stock fared during specific events like the 2008 Global Financial Crisis (down -82%) and the 2020 COVID-19 crash (down -41%), providing a summary table of drawdowns across various shock events. The article concludes by suggesting that understanding these behaviors can help investors avoid panic selling and recommends a diversified, rule-based approach like the Trefis High Quality Portfolio.

feed.title: Pilgrim's Pride to Report Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Pilgrim's Pride Corporation, a major U.S. poultry producer, announced its Q1 2026 financial results will be released after market close on Wednesday, April 30, 2026. The company will also host an earnings conference call on the same day to discuss the results. This report is highly anticipated by analysts and investors as it offers insights into the poultry market's health, consumer demand, and broader economic conditions.

feed.title: Opera Neon’s New MCP Connector Release And What It Might Mean For Opera’s Valuation
feed.summary: Opera has launched its MCP Connector for the AI-focused Opera Neon browser, allowing external AI clients to integrate directly with user sessions and web pages. With Opera's shares showing strong multi-year returns and AI momentum, the article explores whether there's still a buying opportunity given its current valuation of $15.60 against a fair value of $21.50, considering both market opportunities and competitive risks. The company's future growth hinges on navigating increasing competition and potential margin pressures from AI and MiniPay investments.

feed.title: New IAC Voting Pact Reshapes MGM Governance And Valuation Debate
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International and its largest shareholder, IAC Inc. and Barry Diller, have signed a new voting agreement. This pact limits IAC's unilateral voting rights and secures two board seats, offering a clearer governance framework for MGM. The shares are currently trading around $37.1, significantly below analyst targets and Simply Wall St's estimated fair value, with recent gains despite longer-term declines.

feed.title: KeyCorp Uses Financial Mobility Insights To Deepen Advisory Led Banking Relationships
feed.summary: KeyBank, a subsidiary of KeyCorp, has released its 2026 Financial Mobility Survey, revealing significant shifts in how Americans manage their finances and seek guidance. The findings indicate a growing demand for personalized advice and tools, highlighting an opportunity for KeyCorp to deepen its advisory-led banking relationships. This customer data can inform product design and engagement strategies, potentially leading to stronger customer loyalty and better cross-selling of services.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Amgen(AMGN.US) With Hold Rating, Maintains Target Price $350
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated its Hold rating for Amgen (AMGN.US), maintaining its target price at $350. The analyst firm's decision suggests a neutral outlook on the biopharmaceutical company's stock value in the near term. This information reflects Cantor Fitzgerald's continued assessment of Amgen's financial prospects and market position.

feed.title: INVESTOR NOTICE: ODDITY Tech. (ODD) Investors with
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD) for investors who purchased securities between February 26, 2025, and February 24, 2026. This action follows a 49% decline in ODDITY's stock price, triggered by an expected 30% year-over-year Q1 2026 revenue decline due to undisclosed algorithm changes by a major advertising partner. The firm urges investors with substantial losses to come forward to lead the investor class action.

feed.title: Pre-planned sale: Ollie's (NASDAQ: OLLI) chair sells 3,330 shares
feed.summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. Executive Chairman John W. Swygert sold 3,330 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $95.80, totaling $319,014. This transaction was made pursuant to a pre-planned Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on June 23, 2025. After the sale, Swygert directly holds 48,200 shares of Ollie's common stock.

feed.title: After Plunging 15.2% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for InspireMD (NSPR)
feed.summary: InspireMD (NSPR) stock has fallen by 15.2% in the past four weeks but is now considered oversold based on its Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 29.32, suggesting a potential rebound. This technical indicator, combined with a 14.6% increase in consensus EPS estimates from sell-side analysts and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicates that the stock might be poised for a turnaround. Investors may see an opportunity for entry given the exhaustion of selling pressure and positive fundamental shifts.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Omada Health(OMDA.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $23
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reaffirmed its Buy rating for Omada Health (OMDA.US) but has adjusted its price target downwards to $23. This indicates a continued positive outlook on the company's prospects despite a revised valuation.

feed.title: OFA Group announces board changes with appointment of Erwin Baquiran Pineda
feed.summary: OFA Group (NASDAQ:OFAL) has announced an immediate change to its board of directors, with Won Ping Cheng resigning and Erwin Baquiran Pineda appointed as an independent director. Mr. Pineda, a real estate executive, will serve an initial two-year term and be compensated with cash and restricted ordinary shares. This change occurs while the company's shares are trading significantly lower, down 88% over the past year.

feed.title: [8-K] New ERA Energy & Digital, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: New ERA Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI) has filed an 8-K report detailing significant material events. The company entered into a Term Loan Agreement for up to $290 million with Macquarie Equipment Capital Inc., issued warrants and common stock to the lender, and discussed a federal securities class action lawsuit filed against it on April 1, 2026. The report also updated risk factors related to indebtedness, short selling, and power supply constraints for its data center projects.

feed.title: OneMain Holdings, Inc. INVESTOR ALERT: Kirby McInerney LLP Announces Investigation Into Potential Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has initiated an investigation into potential securities fraud by OneMain Holdings, Inc. following a lawsuit filed by the New York Attorney General and a coalition of 12 other state attorneys general. The lawsuit alleges that OneMain misled customers and trapped borrowers in expensive loans with hidden costs, which led to a 5.4% drop in OneMain's share price. The law firm is encouraging investors who purchased OneMain securities to contact them regarding their rights as the investigation proceeds.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital Secures $290M Credit Facility
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital, a Nasdaq-listed company focused on digital infrastructure and renewable energy, has successfully closed a $290 million senior secured term loan credit facility. This financing will support the company's expansion of next-generation digital infrastructure, such as data centers, and renewable energy projects like wind and solar farms, primarily in Texas. The capital will be deployed over the next 12-18 months to fuel its ambitious growth plans and meet the increasing demand for sustainable infrastructure.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital stock surges 23% on $290M loan deal
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital Inc. saw its stock surge by 23% after securing a $290 million senior secured term loan credit facility from Macquarie Group. This financing will support the company's Texas Critical Data Center flagship project. In connection with the loan, Macquarie will also purchase $5 million in common stock and warrants.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital Launches Common Stock Offering
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) commenced an underwritten public offering of its common stock on April 8, 2026. The company intends to use the net proceeds primarily to repay outstanding borrowings under a senior secured convertible promissory note. The offering's completion, size, and terms are subject to market conditions.

feed.title: Wayne Bank parent to post Q1 results before market on April 27
feed.summary: Norwood Financial Corp (Nasdaq: NWFL), parent company of Wayne Bank, announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Monday, April 27, 2026. A live webcast and conference call will follow at 10:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Investors are required to register to receive dial-in details and a unique PIN, with a slide presentation and replay available on the investor relations site after the event.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) launches underwritten common stock sale
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) has announced an underwritten public offering of its common stock, with proceeds primarily intended to repay a senior secured convertible promissory note to SharonAI, Inc. The company plans to grant underwriters a 30-day option to purchase an additional 15% of shares. The offering's terms, including size and pricing, are subject to market conditions, and Northland Capital Markets is serving as the lead book-running manager.

feed.title: PriceSmart Q2 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings preview for PriceSmart's Q2 2026 results. It suggests that the company is expected to report revenue of $1.15 billion and earnings per share of $1.09. The article also notes that PriceSmart has beaten earnings estimates in all of its last four reports.

feed.title: [Form 4] Cloudflare, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. CEO and Board Co-Chair Matthew Prince reported pre-planned stock transactions through family trusts, converting Class B to Class A Common Stock and subsequently selling 156,493 Class A shares for approximately $33.17 million. These transactions, executed between April 6–8, 2026, were done under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in February 2025. Despite the sales, Prince-associated trusts maintain substantial Class B holdings convertible into Class A stock.

feed.title: NATR Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: Nature's Sunshine Products Inc (NATR) generates most of its revenue from the General Health segment, contributing 41.3% or $47.38M of total sales, followed by Digestive and Cardiovascular segments. The company demonstrates strong profitability with a gross margin of 72.52%, an operating margin of 4.30%, and a net margin of 3.65%, alongside a 12.32% Return on Equity. NATR, with a market capitalization of $462.55M, outperforms competitors like NAGE in gross margin but trails USNA.

feed.title: Murphy Oil, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, Crescent Energy, and Patterson-UTI Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Energy stocks including Murphy Oil, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, Crescent Energy, and Patterson-UTI experienced significant drops following President Donald Trump's announcement of a two-week suspension of attacks on Iran. This news led to a massive collapse in crude oil prices as the "war premium" was removed and the outlook for global oil supply shifted to a potential surplus. Investors are rotating out of defensive "inflation hedges" back into growth-oriented sectors, viewing the ceasefire as a sign that the peak of the energy-driven profit cycle may have passed.

feed.title: Pharming Group to report first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8
feed.summary: Pharming Group N.V. will report its preliminary first quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, May 8, 2025. The company will host a presentation for analysts and investors at 13:30 CEST/07:30 am EDT on the same day, requiring advance registration to participate in the conference call or live webcast. Pharming is a global biopharmaceutical company focusing on rare, debilitating, and life-threatening diseases, with headquarters in the Netherlands.

feed.title: NGVT Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: The article provides a financial overview of Ingevity Corp (NGVT), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a comparison with competitors. NGVT generates significant revenue from its Pavement Technologies and Industrial Specialties product lines, with a gross margin of 34.42%. Despite its leading market capitalization of $2.49B, the company reports negative net margins and Return on Equity, highlighting areas for investor consideration.

feed.title: Insurance moves: Arch Insurance, AXA, UIB and Asta
feed.summary: This article details recent senior appointments and promotions across several European insurance companies, including Arch Insurance, AXA Insurance UK, UIB, and Asta. Key moves include new cyber leadership at Arch, a claims transformation role at AXA, a marine leadership transition at UIB, and multiple promotions within Asta to strengthen its leadership team. These changes reflect a focus on growth areas and operational capabilities within the evolving insurance market.

feed.title: APA Corp. (APA) Tumbles 9.8% on Double-Digit Oil Plunge
feed.summary: APA Corp. (NASDAQ:APA) saw its stock price drop by 9.8% due to a significant plunge in crude oil prices. This decline follows an agreement between the US and Iran for a two-week ceasefire, which includes the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil passage. The company, like its peers, had previously benefited from surging oil prices after the strait's initial closure but now faces downward pressure.
